mapper.sql: id, package_id, semantic_version, manifest, content_hash, status, frozen, created_by, reviewed_by, approved_by, revision, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pdp_domain_package_version WHERE package_id = #{packageId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdp_domain_package_version ( id, package_id, semantic_version, manifest, content_hash, status, frozen, created_by, reviewed_by, approved_by, revision, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{packageId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{semanticVersion}, #{manifest,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, #{contentHash}, #{status}, #{frozen}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{reviewedBy,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{approvedBy,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{revision}, #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_domain_package_version SET manifest = #{manifest,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, status = #{status}, frozen = #{frozen}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, approved_by = #{approvedBy,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, revision = #{revision} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{revision} - 1
